Class SMTHandlerProperty<T>

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2.SMTHandlerProperty<T>
Type Parameters:
T - type of the stored data.
Direct Known Subclasses:
SMTHandlerProperty.BooleanProperty, SMTHandlerProperty.EnumProperty, SMTHandlerProperty.IntegerProperty, SMTHandlerProperty.StringProperty
public abstract class SMTHandlerProperty<T> extends Object
SMT handler properties are properties for the new modular smt handler. They can defined individually in each SMTHandler. The settings dialog (etc.) probe the installed SMTHandlers for all available properties. SMT handler properties have a limited system for type safety to avoid nasty exceptions.

    • SMTHandlerProperty

      protected SMTHandlerProperty(String identifier, String label, String description)

  • Method Details

    • verify

      public abstract boolean verify(String value)
      Verify that the given string value can be converted to a value of the stored data type
      Parameters:
      value - potential string representation of a property, not null.
      Returns:
      true iff the argument is a valid representation.

    • fromString

      public abstract T fromString(String s)
      Convert

      Precondition: verify(s) == true

      Parameters:
      s - String to parse into a value
      Returns:
      the value represented by s.

    • defaultValue

      public abstract T defaultValue()
      The default value for the stored data type in case there is no value stored
      Returns:
      a non-null constant value

    • accept

      public abstract <A,R> R accept(SMTHandlerPropertyVisitor<A,R> visitor, A arg)

      public String getIdentifier()

    • getLabel

      public String getLabel()

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()

    • get

      public T get(Services services)
      Extract a value of this property from a Services object. It uses the current proof (that must exist!), accesses its settings and there the new smtsetting.
      Parameters:
      services - non-null services object
      Returns:
      the value read from the services.

    • get

      public T get(Map<String,Object> properties)
      Extract a value of this property from a string property table.
      Parameters:
      properties - non-null map to look up the value
      Returns:
      the value read from the table.
